package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for business_validation_mixed_with_persistence_calls_in_handler: Handlers that start querying or writing before finishing request validation.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule011NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule011NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule011NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario011Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule011NegativeService, input Rule011NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
